hooks.command: filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; [ -z "$filepath" ] && exit 0; case "$filepath" in *.py) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/backend" && uv run ruff format "$filepath" 2>/dev/null && uv run ruff check --fix "$filepath" 2>/dev/null ;; *.ts|*.tsx) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/ui" && npx prettier --write "$filepath" 2>/dev/null ;; esac; exit 0

filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; [ -z "$filepath" ] && exit 0; case "$filepath" in */markdown.ts|*/markdown.py) echo '⚠️  Markdown util changed — run /parchmark-markdown-sync to verify frontend/backend parity' ;; esac; exit 0
